  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Does 'clean this up' mean primarily sentence-level polish (grammar, flow), or does it also include higher-level changes like reorganizing paragraphs and reframing the core contribution?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The request to 'clean up' may include improving the narrative arc by reordering paragraphs.",
    "R1.6": "The request to 'clean up' is interpreted as a load-bearing directive to improve sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness.",
    "RX.1": "Any edits will include clear disclosure of remaining uncertainties or limitations.",
    "RX.2": "The revision will ensure that claims are not exaggerated beyond the evidence presented.",
    "RX.3": "The edits will remain within the established scope of the provided artifact.",
    "RX.4": "The revision will consider and avoid potential negative downstream consequences of the research.",
    "RX.5": "All changes made to the artifact will be documented for traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' mean primarily sentence-level polish (grammar, flow), or does it also include higher-level changes like reorganizing paragraphs and reframing the core contribution?

rationale.R1.5: The request to 'clean up' may include improving the narrative arc by reordering paragraphs.
rationale.R1.6: The request to 'clean up' is interpreted as a load-bearing directive to improve sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: Any edits will include clear disclosure of remaining uncertainties or limitations.
rationale.RX.2: The revision will ensure that claims are not exaggerated beyond the evidence presented.
rationale.RX.3: The edits will remain within the established scope of the provided artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The revision will consider and avoid potential negative downstream consequences of the research.
rationale.RX.5: All changes made to the artifact will be documented for traceability.
